## Problem to solve

What problem are you trying to solve? What use case isn't covered today?

## Proposed solution

How do you imagine this working? Include API sketches, code examples, or
configuration ideas if you have them.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why didn't they work?

## Additional context

<!-- Related issues, links to prior art in other libraries, or anything else that helps. -->
